meta.title: Joan Manuel Romero — Frontend Developer (Vue.js)
meta.description: Frontend Developer specialized in Vue.js. I build scalable, accessible SPAs focused on user experience. Buenos Aires, Argentina.

hero.name: Joan Manuel Romero
hero.title: Frontend Developer specialized in Vue.js and modern web solutions.
hero.subtitle: I turn ideas into functional, scalable digital products.
hero.focus: Focused on user experience and code quality.
hero.credentials: B.Sc. in Technology Management & Systems Analyst

meta.title: About — Joan Manuel Romero
meta.description: My professional profile: Frontend Developer with end-to-end background — from QA and Functional Analysis to SPA development with Vue 3 and Angular.

about.credentials: B.Sc. in Technology Management & Systems Analyst

bio.intro: My strength is my end-to-end path: I started in {qa}, moved into {funcional}, which lets me approach {frontend} with a complete view of {quality}, {ux}, and business needs.
bio.specialty: I currently specialize in building scalable Single Page Applications (SPAs) with Vue.js and Angular, ensuring every component is reusable, accessible, and strictly aligned with functional needs.
bio.values: My working pillars are {communication}, {responsibility} and {learning} — essential for an agile, high-performance environment.

meta.title: Experience — Joan Manuel Romero
meta.description: Career path: Frontend Developer at Ministerio Público Fiscal, Functional Analyst at UXOR IT, and QA Analyst at Nahual IT.

bullets: Part of the full migration of an internal system (formerly Django Admin) to a modern Vue 3 SPA architecture.
Built and maintained reusable components and the internal UI library using PrimeVue and Tailwind CSS.
Owned requirements gathering and documentation for client Victoria Seguros, ensuring alignment between business and the technical team.
Created and maintained flow diagrams and use cases for critical new features.
Coordinated communication between stakeholders and the development team.
Ran functional and regression testing for clients like Mercado Libre, Merck, Stahls and Sancor Seguros.
Built and maintained automated testing scripts using Robot Framework, Selenium and Python.
Focus on accessibility (WCAG) and usability testing to guarantee quality and inclusion standards.

meta.title: Education — Joan Manuel Romero
meta.description: Education: B.Sc. in Technology Management (UNLaM), Higher Technician in Systems Analysis, and Software Testing certification.

technician.title: Higher Technician in Systems Analysis
technician.institution: Instituto de Formación Técnica Superior N° 11

meta.title: Projects — Joan Manuel Romero
meta.description: Tech solutions with real impact: Goludos (football app & web), NutriAmor (AI nutrition), Digital Invitations and practice projects.

projects.subtitle: Tech solutions focused on real impact and scalability.

goludos-mobile.title: Goludos Mobile App
goludos-mobile.description: Complete mobile ecosystem for amateur and professional football. Live results, detailed stats and a fluid native UX.
goludos-mobile.impact: Solves information fragmentation in football leagues, centralizing data and delivering instant updates to thousands of active users.

goludos-web.title: Goludos Web
goludos-web.description: Scalable web platform that complements the mobile experience. Robust admin panel and complex data visualization for league managers and fans.
goludos-web.impact: Lets organizations manage tournaments efficiently and stay accessible from any desktop device.

nutriamor.title: NutriAmor
nutriamor.description: AI-powered nutrition platform. Detailed diet tracking, automatic nutritional analysis of recipes and personalized health reports.
nutriamor.impact: Improves adherence to nutrition plans through immediate, personalized feedback — supporting nutritionists and empowering patients.

invitaciones-digitales.title: Digital Invitations
invitaciones-digitales.description: Full-stack SaaS platform for creating and sharing customizable digital invitations. Covers three modules: commercial landing page, visual invitation editor, and mobile-first final product shareable via WhatsApp.
invitaciones-digitales.impact: Replaces paper invites and WhatsApp groups with a centralized experience featuring real-time RSVP, countdown timer, photo gallery, and gift list — all accessible through a single link.
invitaciones-digitales.videoAlt: Demo of a completed quinceañera invitation

landing.title: Commercial Landing Page
landing.description: Conversion-focused product presentation site. Communicates the value proposition, showcases styles by event type (weddings, quinceañeras, birthdays), explains the 3-step process, and includes pricing, real client testimonials, and FAQ. Designed to capture leads via WhatsApp.

editor.title: Visual Invitation Editor
editor.description: Self-service dashboard where clients enable and configure each section of their invitation: cover, countdown, event info, photo gallery, playlist, map, gift list, and RSVP confirmation. Changes reflected in real time with an integrated mobile preview.

invitation.title: Finished Invitation
invitation.description: The product guests receive: a mobile-first web experience shareable via WhatsApp as a unique link. Features animations, background music, live countdown, interactive gallery, and one-tap RSVP confirmation.

gallery.f: Pricing table — Self-service and Custom plans
gallery.g: Visual editor with real-time invitation preview

adogtame.title: Adógtame
adogtame.description: Platform connecting pet shelters and potential adopters.

pokemon-game.title: Guess the Pokémon
pokemon-game.description: Interactive trivia game built to explore Vue reactivity and external API consumption.

pokedex.title: Pokédex
pokedex.description: Digital encyclopedia showcasing efficient handling of large datasets and async pagination.
